description: Call GET /api/imdb/title-base-query/v1 for IMDb Base Info through JustOneAPI with id.

operations.description: Get IMDb title Base Info data, including title text, release year, and type, for catalog enrichment and title lookup workflows.

parameters.description: The unique IMDb ID of the title (e.g., tt12037194).
parameters.name: id

parameters.description:
Language and country preferences.

Available Values:
- `en_US`: English (US)
- `fr_CA`: French (Canada)
- `fr_FR`: French (France)
- `de_DE`: German (Germany)
- `hi_IN`: Hindi (India)
- `it_IT`: Italian (Italy)
- `pt_BR`: Portuguese (Brazil)
- `es_ES`: Spanish (Spain)
- `es_US`: Spanish (US)
- `es_MX`: Spanish (Mexico)
parameters.name: languageCountry
